responsibilities_implemented: deal flow — validate bet, placeBet, RulesEngine.dealInitial, blackjack short-circuit
action flow — legalActions guard, addToBet for double/split, applyAction, advance to finishRound
finishRound — playDealer, resolveOutcomes, Bankroll.resolve per hand, build message
buildViewState — translates RoundState to ViewState including dealer total hidden until reveal
notes: Each repaint clears DOM and rebinds; safe because UIRender produces fresh elements each call. Dealer total is hidden until all dealer cards are faceUp.
